title: UNHCR Regional Representation for Central and South-East Europe Report Update
summary: This article serves as a metadata entry for a UNHCR report on Central and South-East Europe. It provides no specific details on a humanitarian crisis, its causes, or urgent needs, preventing a proper crisis summary from this text.

title: Flooding in West Java, Indonesia
summary: Heavy rain caused severe flooding in West Java, Indonesia, affecting over 700 people in Bandung and Bogor. Three injuries reported, and one house destroyed. Ongoing light rain forecasts suggest continued challenges for affected communities.

title: Ecuador hit by Severe Floods and Landslides
summary: Ecuador is experiencing an intense 2026 rainy season with 629 floods and 612 landslides since January 1st. 11 people have died, 24 are injured, and over 46,000 are affected. Thousands of homes are destroyed or damaged, primarily in Guayas, El Oro, Esmeraldas, Los Ríos, and Manabí provinces, necessitating ongoing relief.
cause: Severe weather leading to floods and landslides during an intense rainy season.
